creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
Revision 1.54 of 
	/usr/local/www/cvsroot/FreeBSD/ports/net-im/loudmouth/Makefile

	added --enable-debug=no to CONFIGURE_ARGS withoug mentioning it
	in the commit log

	Due to a bug in loudmouth configure script this actually means that
	debugging is enabled.

Fix: 

Remove --enable-debug=no again and bump PORTREVISION
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install irssi-xmpp and wonder why there is lots of debug output
	on console
